summary: Iteration 81 - Feature Locking (Seller Plans), Recipe CRUD, and 3-Click UX testing completed. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed for producer dashboard, recipe pages, and header navigation.

issues: Add to Cart button selector could not be located by generic text search - may need data-testid attribute for easier testing

BACKEND: GET /api/sellers/plans - returns FREE/PRO/ELITE with correct commissions (20%/18%/16%)
BACKEND: GET /api/sellers/me/plan - returns producer plan details (ELITE with 16% commission)
BACKEND: GET /api/sellers/me/plan - requires authentication (401 unauthenticated)
BACKEND: GET /api/recipes - returns list of recipes (6 found)
BACKEND: POST /api/recipes - creates new recipe (authenticated)
BACKEND: GET /api/recipes/{id} - returns recipe detail with enriched ingredients
BACKEND: GET /api/recipes/{invalid} - returns 404 for non-existent recipe
BACKEND: GET /api/recipes?q=TEST_ - search filter works
BACKEND: GET /api/recipes?difficulty=easy - difficulty filter works
BACKEND: POST /api/recipes - requires authentication (401 unauthenticated)
BACKEND: POST /api/recipes/{id}/shopping-list - requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/recipes/{id}/shopping-list - works when authenticated
BACKEND: GET /api/influencers/tiers - returns HERCULES/ATENEA/TITAN tiers
FRONTEND: Header shows 'Recipes' navigation link

3-CLICK UX: Products page accessible in 1 click from homepage
3-CLICK UX: Product detail accessible in 2 clicks from homepage
3-CLICK UX: Recipes page accessible in 1 click from homepage
3-CLICK UX: Recipe detail accessible in 2 clicks from homepage

critical_code_review_comments: LockedFeature component correctly uses data-testid='locked-{featureName}' pattern for testing
ProducerPlanContext correctly implements plan hierarchy (FREE < PRO < ELITE)
Recipe CRUD endpoints properly implemented with authentication
PlanManager component shows plan status, commission rate, and trial end date
Header.js properly includes Recipes link at line ~119 using ChefHat icon
CreateRecipePage.js has all required form elements with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed recipes during backend tests for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified: 1) Feature Locking - producer@test.com has ELITE plan on trial (ends March 18, 2026), so Health Score and Follower Chart are UNLOCKED. LockedFeature overlay only shows for FREE plan users. 2) Recipes CRUD fully working - GET/POST endpoints tested, search and difficulty filters work. 3) Header navigation includes Recipes link. 4) PlanManager shows current plan with upgrade buttons. 5) 3-Click UX verified - products and recipes accessible within 2 clicks from homepage. To test feature locking for FREE plan, would need a test account with FREE plan.

three_click_ux_audit.assessment: PASS - All key flows accessible within 3 clicks
